articles.title: BoE: March cut still likely as MPC eyes domestic data – TD Securities
articles.snippet: TD Securities analysts note that markets have scaled back expectations for a March Bank of England cut, but argues the MPC’s domestic focus still supports easing.

combined_text:
[0.67] BoE: March cut still likely as MPC eyes domestic data – TD Securities
TD Securities analysts note that markets have scaled back expectations for a March Bank of England cut, but argues the MPC’s domestic focus still supports easing.
